data.body: E2 read-ish scope COMPLETE: field-reads (E2.1), lookups exists/resolve/format (E2.2), list-descendants (E2.3), gates clarity/check-ac/quality/summary (E2.4) — all ported in-process + dual-run parity + library rewired, 6 commits green. RECLASSIFY: 'delete' moved to E3 (write/lifecycle) — it is a destructive WRITE (STATUS+tombstone+UNLINK events, atomic commit through the write core rebar._store), sharing machinery with transition/claim/compact, not a read-ish command. Closing E2; delete tracked under E3.
